title: AlbumSequencePacket
description: Stage-3 output from maker:playlist-builder (Curator-Performer). Captures the final track sequence with harmonic flow, energy-arc roles, and BPM/Camelot metadata ready for DJ handoff or mastering. Consumed by StudioPipeline / DJ skill (see docs/dj_handoff.md).

$schema.description: JSON Schema identifier. Must reference this schema's $id.

schema_version.description: Semantic version of this packet schema.

packet_id.description: Globally unique ULID identifying this packet instance.

album_title.description: Human-readable title for the album or playlist.

sequence.description: Ordered list of tracks in playback order (position 1 = first track).

source_packet_ids.description: packet_ids of all CompositionStatePackets consumed to produce this sequence.

arc_type.description: Energy-arc template applied during sequencing (from playlist-builder v0.4.0 arc library).

total_duration_seconds.description: Estimated total playback duration in seconds, if known.

sequenced_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when this sequence was finalized (see docs/data_integrity.md).

notes.description: Optional Curator-Performer commentary on sequencing decisions, Camelot exceptions, or BPM bridge choices.

track_id.description: Stable track identifier, unchanged from AcousticIngestPacket and CompositionStatePacket.

title.description: Track title (copied from AcousticIngestPacket for convenience).

camelot_code.description: Final Camelot Wheel code assigned by Curator-Performer for harmonic sequencing.

bpm.description: Track tempo used for beatmatch decisions.

arc_role.description: Role of this track in the energy arc.

transition_notes.description: Optional Curator-Performer notes on the transition from the previous track (e.g. harmonic bridge, BPM ramp).
